goal: Add request ID middleware to backend/server.py. Each request should be assigned a unique UUID (X-Request-ID header). If the client sends an X-Request-ID header, use that value; otherwise generate a new UUID. The request ID should appear in the response headers and in the request log line. Add a pytest test that verifies the X-Request-ID header is present in responses.
acceptance_criteria: Every response includes an X-Request-ID header
Server-generated X-Request-ID is a valid UUID
Request ID appears in log output
